hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); b=$(basename "$f"); if [[ $b == .env || ( $b == .env.* && $b != .env.example ) ]]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".env files contain Supabase secrets - create or edit them manually"}}'; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); b=$(basename "$f"); if [[ $b == package-lock.json || $b == pnpm-lock.yaml || $b == yarn.lock ]]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Lock files are generated - run npm install instead of editing them"}}'; fi
